title: You are a Code Reviewer. Evaluate code quality on a 7-point scale. ## TASK Review VOICEVOX PNG portrait implementation quality (6 files, ~600 total lines). ## EVALUATION (7 points max) - Accuracy (3 pts): Bugs, logic errors, edge cases - Performance (2 pts): Unnecessary computation, memory, Remotion...
summary_text: { "scores": { "accuracy": 2, "performance": 1, "maintainability": 1 }, "total": 4, "issues": [ { "severity": "major", "file": "src/layers/character-parts.tsx", "line": "73", "description": "CharacterPortrait uses CSS `transition` for `transform`/`filter` inside a Remotion render path. CSS time-based transitions are not frame-driven and can produce preview/render mismatch or non-deterministic interpolation when frames are jumped/rendered out of real-time.", "suggestion": "Remove CSS transitions and compute all animation states from `frame` (e.g., `interpolate`/`spring`) so each frame is fully deterministic." }, { "severity": "minor", "file": "scripts/setup-voicevox-portraits.ts", "line": "104", "description": "Portrait downloads are strictly sequential (`for` + `await`), increasing setup time unnecessarily.", "suggestion": "Use bounded parallelism (e.g., `Promise.allSettled` with a small concurrency limit) to speed up setup while keeping GitHub/raw endpoint load reasonable." }, { "severity": "minor", "file": "src/services/tts/voicevox-characters.ts", "line": "20", "description": "Speaker IDs `0` and `2` (and similarly `1` and `3`) duplicate full character metadata objects. This is likely intentional for style variants, but duplication risks drift if one copy is edited later.", "suggestion": "Normalize into `styleId -> characterKey` mapping plus a single character metadata table." }, { "severity": "minor", "file": "src/services/tts/voicevox-characters.ts", "line": "99", "description": "`ALL_CHARACTERS` repeats character data already present in `CHARACTER_MAP`, creating multiple sources of truth.", "suggestion": "Derive `ALL_CHARACTERS` programmatically from `CHARACTER_MAP` (unique by `uuid`/`slug`) or keep only one canonical structure." } ], "summary": "Key checks: (1) `CharacterLayer` blink `useMemo` dependency is stable in practice; `isPngMode` is a boolean and does not inherently invalidate memoization every frame. (2) `mouthShapeToIntensity()` is currently exhaustive for the `MouthShape` union. Main risk is Remotion determinism due to CSS transitions, plus maintainability/perf issues from duplicated character data and sequential setup downloads." }
